description_long: This office building is a tall, narrow structure with a sleek, modern design. The facade features a series of evenly spaced, horizontal bands of blue-tinted glass windows, separated by dark structural elements, giving it a high-tech and contemporary appearance. The building's corners are rounded, softening its otherwise rectilinear form and enhancing its streamlined look. The windows are arranged in a highly regular, stacked pattern, suggesting multiple floors with consistent floor heights. The exterior is predominantly dark, with the blue glass providing a striking contrast and visual interest. There is no visible signage or prominent entrance detail on the exterior, emphasizing its minimalist and corporate aesthetic.
description: A tall, narrow office building with blue-tinted horizontal window bands and a sleek, modern facade. The structure features rounded corners and a regular, stacked window pattern.
description_view_0: The building appears as a thin, dark vertical line with minimal visible detail, showing its narrowest side.
description_view_1: This view highlights the blue-tinted horizontal window bands and the rounded corner, revealing the building's modern facade.
description_view_2: Seen from above, the building's elongated, narrow footprint and the regular spacing of the window bands are visible.
description_view_3: Similar to view 1, this side also displays the blue-tinted window bands and rounded corner, emphasizing the building's symmetry.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular, horizontal bands of blue-tinted glass windows stacked uniformly across all floors.
